headline: Fortive (FTV) Leaves An Index, Is The Stock Still Cheap?
summary: Index removal puts Fortive in focus ahead of earnings Fortive (FTV) recently dropped from the Russell 1000 Dynamic Index, a shift that may prompt investors to reassess how the stock fits into portfolios that track or reference major benchmarks. The index change arrives as Fortive prepares to report its fiscal second quarter 2026 results on July 29, with the stock already showing double digit total return over the past year.
